title: Monkey Banners
body:
# Monkey Banners

Monkey Banners adds a new banner pattern! You can make many new monkey-themed banner patterns with this new banner pattern!

With five unique monkey-themed banner patterns: Chi, Bongo, Nut, Chiquis, and Kiko. with two bananas to choose from!

The vanilla Roundel has three more variants added with the new banner pattern item for more creativity.

You need paper, cocoa beans, and bamboo to craft the monkey banner pattern!
